description: This C# source file implements an in-memory repository for Asset objects, supporting CRUD operations, listing, and copy lineage tracking, primarily for demo purposes within the DemoAssetDotnetApi project.

classes.name: InMemoryAssetRepository
classes.description: A sealed class implementing IAssetRepository, providing in-memory storage and management of AssetAggregateDto objects with support for listing, adding, editing, deleting, and copying assets, including lineage tracking.

classes.name: StoredAsset
classes.description: A nested sealed class representing stored asset data, including the asset DTO, deletion status, deletion reason, timestamp, and copy lineage information.

methods.name: UpsertAggregateAsync
methods.description: Creates or updates an asset in the repository, handling copy semantics, idempotency, and uniqueness constraints.

methods.name: ListAsync
methods.description: Returns a list of asset summaries filtered by search term and deletion status.

methods.name: GetByIdAsync
methods.description: Retrieves an asset by site and asset ID, returning null if not found or deleted.

methods.name: SoftDeleteAsync
methods.description: Marks an asset as deleted with an optional reason.

methods.name: HardDeleteAsync
methods.description: Removes an asset permanently from the repository.

methods.name: GetCopyLineageForTargetAsync
methods.description: Retrieves the copy lineage information for a specific asset.

methods.name: UpdateCopyLineageReplicationAsync
methods.description: Updates the replication status and impacted modules of a copy lineage for a specific asset.

methods.name: CloneLineage
methods.description: Creates a deep copy of a CopyLineageDto object.

methods.name: CloneAggregate
methods.description: Creates a deep copy of an AssetAggregateDto, assigning the specified site ID.
